title: Chocolate Brownies
description: Rich, fudgy chocolate brownies with a soft center and crackly top.

ingredients.name: Optional
ingredients.quantity: ½ tsp salt, ½ cup chocolate chips
ingredients.qty: ½ tsp salt, ½ cup chocolate chips

steps.title: Prep the pan
steps.description: Preheat oven to 175°C (350°F). Line 8×8 inch pan with parchment paper or lightly grease it.
steps.text: Preheat oven to 175°C (350°F). Line 8×8 inch pan with parchment paper or lightly grease it.

steps.title: Mix dry ingredients
steps.description: Whisk flour, cocoa powder, and salt to prevent clumps and ensure even distribution.
steps.text: Whisk flour, cocoa powder, and salt to prevent clumps and ensure even distribution.

steps.title: Combine wet ingredients
steps.description: Stir melted butter, both sugars, eggs, and vanilla extract until smooth and well blended.
steps.text: Stir melted butter, both sugars, eggs, and vanilla extract until smooth and well blended.

steps.title: Make the batter
steps.description: Gently fold dry into wet until just combined. Do not overmix. Add chocolate chips if desired.
steps.text: Gently fold dry into wet until just combined. Do not overmix. Add chocolate chips if desired.

steps.title: Bake
steps.description: Pour into prepared pan, bake 20–25 min until edges set but center is slightly soft. Toothpick should have moist crumbs, not wet batter.
steps.text: Pour into prepared pan, bake 20–25 min until edges set but center is slightly soft. Toothpick should have moist crumbs, not wet batter.

steps.title: Cool and serve
steps.description: Cool 10 min in pan, lift out with parchment, cool completely on wire rack. Cut into 8 squares.
steps.text: Cool 10 min in pan, lift out with parchment, cool completely on wire rack. Cut into 8 squares.

tip: Don't overbake for fudgy brownies. For cakey texture, bake 2–3 minutes longer.

title: Chicken Fried Rice
description: A quick chicken fried rice with tender chicken, vegetables, egg, and savory sauces.

steps.title: Cook egg
steps.description: Scramble egg in hot oil, remove from pan and cut into strips.
steps.text: Scramble egg in hot oil, remove from pan and cut into strips.

steps.title: Sauté chicken
steps.description: In the same pan, cook diced chicken until golden, then add garlic and stir.
steps.text: In the same pan, cook diced chicken until golden, then add garlic and stir.

steps.title: Add veggies
steps.description: Stir-fry mixed vegetables for 2–3 min until tender-crisp.
steps.text: Stir-fry mixed vegetables for 2–3 min until tender-crisp.

steps.title: Add rice
steps.description: Toss in day-old rice, break apart any clumps, cook 2–3 min.
steps.text: Toss in day-old rice, break apart any clumps, cook 2–3 min.

steps.title: Season
steps.description: Add soy sauce, oyster sauce, and sesame oil; mix well.
steps.text: Add soy sauce, oyster sauce, and sesame oil; mix well.

steps.title: Finish
steps.description: Add egg strips, toss everything for 1 min, and serve hot.
steps.text: Add egg strips, toss everything for 1 min, and serve hot.

title: Kunafa Delight
description: A golden Middle Eastern kunafa dessert soaked with fragrant syrup and pistachios.

steps.title: Make syrup
steps.description: Simmer sugar, water, lemon juice, and cinnamon together until slightly thickened, ~10 min.
steps.text: Simmer sugar, water, lemon juice, and cinnamon together until slightly thickened, ~10 min.

steps.title: Prep kunafa
steps.description: Mix shredded pastry with melted ghee until every strand is evenly coated.
steps.text: Mix shredded pastry with melted ghee until every strand is evenly coated.

steps.title: Layer base
steps.description: Press half the pastry firmly into a greased baking pan.
steps.text: Press half the pastry firmly into a greased baking pan.

steps.title: Add nuts
steps.description: Sprinkle chopped pistachios evenly across the layer.
steps.text: Sprinkle chopped pistachios evenly across the layer.

steps.title: Top layer
steps.description: Add remaining pastry on top and press gently to seal.
steps.text: Add remaining pastry on top and press gently to seal.

steps.title: Bake and soak
steps.description: Bake at 180°C for 25–30 min until golden. Pour syrup over immediately, cool, and serve.
steps.text: Bake at 180°C for 25–30 min until golden. Pour syrup over immediately, cool, and serve.

title: Loaded Cheese Fries
description: Crispy fries loaded with warm cheese sauce, bacon, sour cream, and chives.

steps.title: Make fries
steps.description: Cut potatoes into sticks, fry until golden and crispy, drain on paper, and season with salt.
steps.text: Cut potatoes into sticks, fry until golden and crispy, drain on paper, and season with salt.

steps.title: Prepare cheese
steps.description: Warm cheese sauce in a saucepan or melt shredded cheddar over low heat.
steps.text: Warm cheese sauce in a saucepan or melt shredded cheddar over low heat.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.description: Spread hot fries on a serving plate, pour cheese sauce generously over them.
steps.text: Spread hot fries on a serving plate, pour cheese sauce generously over them.

steps.title: Add toppings
steps.description: Sprinkle crumbled bacon, drizzle sour cream, and scatter chives over the top.
steps.text: Sprinkle crumbled bacon, drizzle sour cream, and scatter chives over the top.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Enjoy immediately while hot and cheesy.
steps.text: Enjoy immediately while hot and cheesy.

title: Crispy Masala Dosa
description: Crisp fermented dosa wrapped around a warm spiced potato masala filling.

steps.title: Ferment batter
steps.description: Grind soaked rice, dal, and fenugreek seeds; ferment batter for 6–8 hours.
steps.text: Grind soaked rice, dal, and fenugreek seeds; ferment batter for 6–8 hours.

steps.title: Make filling
steps.description: Boil and mash potatoes. Sauté onions and chilies, add mashed potato and spices.
steps.text: Boil and mash potatoes. Sauté onions and chilies, add mashed potato and spices.

steps.title: Cook dosa
steps.description: Spread a thin layer of batter on a hot griddle and drizzle oil along the edges.
steps.text: Spread a thin layer of batter on a hot griddle and drizzle oil along the edges.

steps.title: Fry
steps.description: Cook until golden and crispy on both sides.
steps.text: Cook until golden and crispy on both sides.

steps.title: Add filling
steps.description: Place potato masala filling in the center of the dosa.
steps.text: Place potato masala filling in the center of the dosa.

steps.title: Fold
steps.description: Fold the dosa over the filling to enclose it.
steps.text: Fold the dosa over the filling to enclose it.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Hot with coconut chutney and sambar.
steps.text: Hot with coconut chutney and sambar.

title: Creamy Mushroom Risotto
description: Creamy Italian risotto with sauteed mushrooms, Parmesan, and tender arborio rice.

steps.title: Sauté mushrooms
steps.description: Cook sliced mushrooms in butter until browned and tender, remove from pan.
steps.text: Cook sliced mushrooms in butter until browned and tender, remove from pan.

steps.title: Cook onion and garlic
steps.description: In the same pan, soften onion in butter, then add garlic.
steps.text: In the same pan, soften onion in butter, then add garlic.

steps.title: Toast rice
steps.description: Add arborio rice, stir for 2 min until edges become translucent.
steps.text: Add arborio rice, stir for 2 min until edges become translucent.

steps.title: Add wine
steps.description: Stir in white wine, cook 1 min until mostly absorbed.
steps.text: Stir in white wine, cook 1 min until mostly absorbed.

steps.title: Add broth
steps.description: Ladle warm broth in gradually, stirring constantly until each addition is absorbed, ~18–20 min.
steps.text: Ladle warm broth in gradually, stirring constantly until each addition is absorbed, ~18–20 min.

steps.title: Finish
steps.description: Fold in sautéed mushrooms, grated Parmesan, and a knob of butter. Serve hot.
steps.text: Fold in sautéed mushrooms, grated Parmesan, and a knob of butter. Serve hot.

title: Spicy Japanese Ramen
description: A spicy ramen bowl with chili broth, chicken, eggs, noodles, and crisp vegetables.

steps.title: Cook broth
steps.description: Simmer chicken broth with soy sauce, chili paste, and garlic for 10 min.
steps.text: Simmer chicken broth with soy sauce, chili paste, and garlic for 10 min.

steps.title: Cook chicken
steps.description: Boil or pan-fry chicken breast until done, then slice thinly.
steps.text: Boil or pan-fry chicken breast until done, then slice thinly.

steps.title: Boil eggs
steps.description: Hard-boil eggs for 7 min, peel, and halve lengthwise.
steps.text: Hard-boil eggs for 7 min, peel, and halve lengthwise.

steps.title: Cook noodles
steps.description: Boil ramen noodles 3–4 min until tender, then drain.
steps.text: Boil ramen noodles 3–4 min until tender, then drain.

steps.title: Prep veggies
steps.description: Lightly cook baby corn and bamboo shoots until tender-crisp.
steps.text: Lightly cook baby corn and bamboo shoots until tender-crisp.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.description: Place noodles in bowls, pour hot broth over, top with chicken, eggs, and veggies.
steps.text: Place noodles in bowls, pour hot broth over, top with chicken, eggs, and veggies.

steps.title: Finish
steps.description: Drizzle sesame oil over each bowl and serve immediately.
steps.text: Drizzle sesame oil over each bowl and serve immediately.

title: Chicken Shawarma
description: Tender Middle Eastern chicken shawarma wrapped in warm pita with tahini and pickles.

steps.title: Season chicken
steps.description: Mix cumin, paprika, minced garlic, and lemon juice; coat chicken strips evenly.
steps.text: Mix cumin, paprika, minced garlic, and lemon juice; coat chicken strips evenly.

steps.title: Cook chicken
steps.description: Grill or pan-fry strips until slightly charred and fully cooked through.
steps.text: Grill or pan-fry strips until slightly charred and fully cooked through.

steps.title: Make tahini
steps.description: Blend tahini with garlic, lemon juice, and a splash of water to a pourable consistency.
steps.text: Blend tahini with garlic, lemon juice, and a splash of water to a pourable consistency.

steps.title: Prep bread
steps.description: Warm pita briefly on a skillet or open flame.
steps.text: Warm pita briefly on a skillet or open flame.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.description: Fill pita with chicken strips, diced tomato, pickles, and drizzle tahini sauce.
steps.text: Fill pita with chicken strips, diced tomato, pickles, and drizzle tahini sauce.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Roll tightly, slice in half, and serve.
steps.text: Roll tightly, slice in half, and serve.

title: Mexican Beef Tacos
description: Seasoned beef tacos finished with lettuce, cheese, salsa-ready shells, and bold spice.

steps.title: Cook beef
steps.description: Sauté diced onion and garlic, add ground beef, cook until browned.
steps.text: Sauté diced onion and garlic, add ground beef, cook until browned.

steps.title: Season
steps.description: Add chili powder and tomato sauce, simmer for 5 min.
steps.text: Add chili powder and tomato sauce, simmer for 5 min.

steps.title: Warm shells
steps.description: Heat taco shells in oven or dry pan briefly.
steps.text: Heat taco shells in oven or dry pan briefly.

steps.title: Fill
steps.description: Spoon seasoned beef into each taco shell.
steps.text: Spoon seasoned beef into each taco shell.

steps.title: Top
steps.description: Add shredded lettuce and cheese.
steps.text: Add shredded lettuce and cheese.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Immediately with lime wedges or salsa.
steps.text: Immediately with lime wedges or salsa.

title: Pasta (Spaghetti, Alfredo)
description: Classic spaghetti tossed in a rich garlic Alfredo sauce with Parmesan and cream.

steps.title: Cook pasta
steps.description: Boil spaghetti in salted water 8–10 min until al dente, drain, reserve ¼ cup pasta water.
steps.text: Boil spaghetti in salted water 8–10 min until al dente, drain, reserve ¼ cup pasta water.

steps.title: Sauté garlic
steps.description: Melt butter in a pan, lightly cook garlic for 1 min.
steps.text: Melt butter in a pan, lightly cook garlic for 1 min.

steps.title: Add cream
steps.description: Stir in heavy cream, bring to a gentle simmer for 3 min.
steps.text: Stir in heavy cream, bring to a gentle simmer for 3 min.

steps.title: Add cheese
steps.description: Mix in grated Parmesan until sauce is smooth and creamy.
steps.text: Mix in grated Parmesan until sauce is smooth and creamy.

steps.title: Season
steps.description: Add salt and black pepper.
steps.text: Add salt and black pepper.

steps.title: Combine
steps.description: Toss cooked spaghetti in Alfredo sauce, add reserved pasta water if too thick. Serve hot.
steps.text: Toss cooked spaghetti in Alfredo sauce, add reserved pasta water if too thick. Serve hot.

title: Chicken Biriyani
description: Layered chicken biriyani with fragrant basmati rice, masala, herbs, ghee, and dum cooking.

steps.title: Soak rice
steps.description: Wash basmati rice, soak in cold water for 30 min, drain.
steps.text: Wash basmati rice, soak in cold water for 30 min, drain.

steps.title: Cook chicken
steps.description: Sauté fried onion with ginger-garlic paste, add chicken, tomato, masala, yogurt, and salt. Cook 15 min.
steps.text: Sauté fried onion with ginger-garlic paste, add chicken, tomato, masala, yogurt, and salt. Cook 15 min.

steps.title: Par-cook rice
steps.description: Boil rice in salted water for exactly 5 min (70% cooked), drain immediately.
steps.text: Boil rice in salted water for exactly 5 min (70% cooked), drain immediately.

steps.title: Layer
steps.description: Layer chicken masala first, then par-cooked rice, fried onion, mint, green chilies, and ghee in a heavy pot.
steps.text: Layer chicken masala first, then par-cooked rice, fried onion, mint, green chilies, and ghee in a heavy pot.

steps.title: Dum
steps.description: Seal the pot tightly with foil or dough, cook on low heat for 25–30 min.
steps.text: Seal the pot tightly with foil or dough, cook on low heat for 25–30 min.

steps.title: Rest
steps.description: Remove from heat, let sit undisturbed for 10 min.
steps.text: Remove from heat, let sit undisturbed for 10 min.

steps.title: Mix
steps.description: Gently fluff and mix layers without breaking the rice.
steps.text: Gently fluff and mix layers without breaking the rice.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Hot with raita and sliced onions.
steps.text: Hot with raita and sliced onions.

title: Hot Dogs
description: A quick American hot dog with toasted buns, sausage, ketchup, mustard, onion, and cheese.

steps.title: Cook sausages
steps.description: Grill or boil hot dog sausages until fully heated and slightly charred on the outside.
steps.text: Grill or boil hot dog sausages until fully heated and slightly charred on the outside.

steps.title: Toast buns
steps.description: Lightly grill buns on a dry pan until golden.
steps.text: Lightly grill buns on a dry pan until golden.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.description: Place sausage inside the toasted bun.
steps.text: Place sausage inside the toasted bun.

steps.title: Top
steps.description: Add ketchup, mustard, diced onion, and shredded cheese.
steps.text: Add ketchup, mustard, diced onion, and shredded cheese.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Immediately while hot.
steps.text: Immediately while hot.

title: Noodles
description: Stir-fried noodles with vegetables, soy sauce, garlic, chili flakes, and egg.

steps.title: Cook noodles
steps.description: Boil noodles for 3–4 min until done, drain and set aside.
steps.text: Boil noodles for 3–4 min until done, drain and set aside.

steps.title: Sauté garlic
steps.description: Heat oil in a wok, add garlic and cook for 1 min.
steps.text: Heat oil in a wok, add garlic and cook for 1 min.

steps.title: Add veggies
steps.description: Stir-fry carrots, beans, and cabbage for 3 min until tender-crisp.
steps.text: Stir-fry carrots, beans, and cabbage for 3 min until tender-crisp.

steps.title: Cook egg
steps.description: Push veggies aside, scramble egg in the pan, then mix together.
steps.text: Push veggies aside, scramble egg in the pan, then mix together.

steps.title: Combine
steps.description: Add cooked noodles, soy sauce, chili flakes, and salt. Toss everything together.
steps.text: Add cooked noodles, soy sauce, chili flakes, and salt. Toss everything together.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Hot immediately.
steps.text: Hot immediately.

title: Kebab (Kofta)
description: Juicy kofta-style kebabs made with ground meat, herbs, warm spices, and tahini-ready flavor.

steps.title: Mix
steps.description: Combine ground meat, grated onion, garlic, cumin, coriander, parsley, and salt. Mix until well combined.
steps.text: Combine ground meat, grated onion, garlic, cumin, coriander, parsley, and salt. Mix until well combined.

steps.title: Shape
steps.description: Form mixture into cylinders around skewers or hand-roll into elongated oval shapes.
steps.text: Form mixture into cylinders around skewers or hand-roll into elongated oval shapes.

steps.title: Chill
steps.description: Rest shaped kebabs in the fridge for 30 min to hold their form.
steps.text: Rest shaped kebabs in the fridge for 30 min to hold their form.

steps.title: Cook
steps.description: Grill or pan-fry kebabs until browned on all sides and fully cooked through.
steps.text: Grill or pan-fry kebabs until browned on all sides and fully cooked through.

steps.title: Drain
steps.description: Remove excess oil on paper towels.
steps.text: Remove excess oil on paper towels.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Hot with tahini sauce or fresh salad.
steps.text: Hot with tahini sauce or fresh salad.

title: Juicy Burger
description: A juicy burger with cheese, onion, tomato, lettuce, and burger sauce in toasted buns.

steps.title: Form patties
steps.description: Season ground beef with salt and pepper, divide into 4 equal patties.
steps.text: Season ground beef with salt and pepper, divide into 4 equal patties.

steps.title: Cook
steps.description: Grill patties for 4 min each side until juicy but fully cooked. Add cheese slice in last minute.
steps.text: Grill patties for 4 min each side until juicy but fully cooked. Add cheese slice in last minute.

steps.title: Toast buns
steps.description: Lightly grill buns on a hot pan until golden.
steps.text: Lightly grill buns on a hot pan until golden.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.description: Bottom bun, burger sauce, patty with cheese, sliced onion, tomato, lettuce.
steps.text: Bottom bun, burger sauce, patty with cheese, sliced onion, tomato, lettuce.

steps.title: Top
steps.description: Close with top bun.
steps.text: Close with top bun.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Hot immediately.
steps.text: Hot immediately.

title: Cheesy Pizza
description: A bubbly cheese pizza layered with mozzarella, cheddar, tomato sauce, and a crisp crust.

steps.title: Prep dough
steps.description: Stretch dough onto a greased pan, drizzle with olive oil.
steps.text: Stretch dough onto a greased pan, drizzle with olive oil.

steps.title: Sauce
steps.description: Spread tomato sauce evenly leaving a small border.
steps.text: Spread tomato sauce evenly leaving a small border.

steps.title: Cheese
steps.description: Layer mozzarella first, then scatter cheddar on top.
steps.text: Layer mozzarella first, then scatter cheddar on top.

steps.title: Season
steps.description: Sprinkle garlic powder and a pinch of salt.
steps.text: Sprinkle garlic powder and a pinch of salt.

steps.title: Bake
steps.description: Bake at 200°C (400°F) for 15–18 min until crust is golden and cheese is bubbly.
steps.text: Bake at 200°C (400°F) for 15–18 min until crust is golden and cheese is bubbly.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Slice and serve hot.
steps.text: Slice and serve hot.

title: Crispy Fried Chicken
description: Crunchy double-coated fried chicken with a seasoned golden crust.

steps.title: Marinate
steps.description: Mix chicken with egg, milk, and spices. Rest for 30 min.
steps.text: Mix chicken with egg, milk, and spices. Rest for 30 min.

steps.title: Dredge
steps.description: Coat each piece thoroughly in flour and cornstarch mixture.
steps.text: Coat each piece thoroughly in flour and cornstarch mixture.

steps.title: Double-coat
steps.description: Dip back in egg wash, then coat in flour mix again for extra crunch.
steps.text: Dip back in egg wash, then coat in flour mix again for extra crunch.

steps.title: Fry
steps.description: Heat oil to 180°C, fry pieces for 10–12 min until deep golden and cooked through.
steps.text: Heat oil to 180°C, fry pieces for 10–12 min until deep golden and cooked through.

steps.title: Drain
steps.description: Remove and drain on paper towels.
steps.text: Remove and drain on paper towels.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Hot and crispy.
steps.text: Hot and crispy.

title: Golden Fries
description: Classic twice-fried golden fries with a crisp outside and fluffy center.

steps.title: Cut
steps.description: Slice potatoes into uniform sticks, rinse under cold water, and dry thoroughly with a cloth.
steps.text: Slice potatoes into uniform sticks, rinse under cold water, and dry thoroughly with a cloth.

steps.title: First fry
steps.description: Fry at 160°C for 5 min until softened but not coloured. Drain on paper.
steps.text: Fry at 160°C for 5 min until softened but not coloured. Drain on paper.

steps.title: Second fry
steps.description: Increase oil to 180°C, fry again for 3–4 min until golden and crispy.
steps.text: Increase oil to 180°C, fry again for 3–4 min until golden and crispy.

steps.title: Season
steps.description: Toss with salt and paprika immediately, serve hot.
steps.text: Toss with salt and paprika immediately, serve hot.

title: Grilled Chicken
description: Lemon-garlic grilled chicken with simple seasoning and juicy slices.

steps.title: Marinate
steps.description: Mix olive oil, minced garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Coat chicken and marinate for 30 min minimum.
steps.text: Mix olive oil, minced garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Coat chicken and marinate for 30 min minimum.

steps.title: Preheat grill
steps.description: Set grill to medium-high heat.
steps.text: Set grill to medium-high heat.

steps.title: Grill
steps.description: Cook chicken 6–7 min each side until fully cooked with grill marks.
steps.text: Cook chicken 6–7 min each side until fully cooked with grill marks.

steps.title: Rest
steps.description: Let chicken rest for 5 min before slicing.
steps.text: Let chicken rest for 5 min before slicing.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Hot with salad or grilled vegetables.
steps.text: Hot with salad or grilled vegetables.

title: Fresh Salad
description: A fresh chopped salad with greens, tomato, carrot, cucumber, olive oil, and lemon.

steps.title: Prep veggies
steps.description: Wash and chop all vegetables into bite-sized pieces.
steps.text: Wash and chop all vegetables into bite-sized pieces.

steps.title: Mix
steps.description: Combine mixed greens, tomato, carrot, and cucumber in a large bowl.
steps.text: Combine mixed greens, tomato, carrot, and cucumber in a large bowl.

steps.title: Dress
steps.description: Drizzle olive oil and lemon juice over the salad, toss gently to coat.
steps.text: Drizzle olive oil and lemon juice over the salad, toss gently to coat.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Fresh immediately.
steps.text: Fresh immediately.

title: Fresh Salmon
description: Pan or grill cooked salmon with garlic, lemon, olive oil, and a tender flaky finish.

steps.title: Season
steps.description: Rub salmon fillets with olive oil, minced garlic, salt, and black pepper on both sides.
steps.text: Rub salmon fillets with olive oil, minced garlic, salt, and black pepper on both sides.

steps.title: Preheat
steps.description: Heat grill or pan to medium heat and lightly oil.
steps.text: Heat grill or pan to medium heat and lightly oil.

steps.title: Cook
steps.description: Place fillets and cook 4–5 min per side until cooked through and flaky.
steps.text: Place fillets and cook 4–5 min per side until cooked through and flaky.

steps.title: Add lemon
steps.description: Place lemon slices on top while cooking for aroma and flavour.
steps.text: Place lemon slices on top while cooking for aroma and flavour.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Hot with sides or salad.
steps.text: Hot with sides or salad.

title: Warm Soup
description: A warm vegetable soup with broth, potato, garlic, butter, and thyme.

steps.title: Sauté
steps.description: Melt butter in a pot, cook garlic, then add diced onion, celery, and carrot until softened.
steps.text: Melt butter in a pot, cook garlic, then add diced onion, celery, and carrot until softened.

steps.title: Add potato and broth
steps.description: Add diced potato and pour in vegetable broth. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 20 min.
steps.text: Add diced potato and pour in vegetable broth. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 20 min.

steps.title: Season
steps.description: Add salt and thyme, stir to combine.
steps.text: Add salt and thyme, stir to combine.

steps.title: Blend
steps.description: Partially blend for a creamier consistency (optional — keep chunky if preferred).
steps.text: Partially blend for a creamier consistency (optional — keep chunky if preferred).

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Hot.
steps.text: Hot.

title: Soft Cookies
description: Soft cookies with butter, vanilla, and chocolate chips baked until gently golden.

steps.title: Mix butter and sugar
steps.description: Cream softened butter and sugar together until light and fluffy.
steps.text: Cream softened butter and sugar together until light and fluffy.

steps.title: Add egg and vanilla
steps.description: Beat in egg and vanilla extract until fully incorporated.
steps.text: Beat in egg and vanilla extract until fully incorporated.

steps.title: Dry mix
steps.description: Whisk flour and baking soda together, then fold into the wet mixture.
steps.text: Whisk flour and baking soda together, then fold into the wet mixture.

steps.title: Add chips
steps.description: Fold chocolate chips gently into the dough.
steps.text: Fold chocolate chips gently into the dough.

steps.title: Bake
steps.description: Drop spoonfuls on a lined baking sheet, bake at 180°C for 10–12 min until edges golden but center soft.
steps.text: Drop spoonfuls on a lined baking sheet, bake at 180°C for 10–12 min until edges golden but center soft.

steps.title: Cool
steps.description: Cool on a wire rack before serving.
steps.text: Cool on a wire rack before serving.

title: Sweet Cupcakes
description: Light sweet cupcakes with vanilla batter and optional frosting.

steps.title: Cream butter and sugar
steps.description: Beat softened butter and sugar until pale and fluffy.
steps.text: Beat softened butter and sugar until pale and fluffy.

steps.title: Add eggs and vanilla
steps.description: Mix in eggs one at a time, then vanilla.
steps.text: Mix in eggs one at a time, then vanilla.

steps.title: Mix dry
steps.description: Sift flour and baking powder together.
steps.text: Sift flour and baking powder together.

steps.title: Combine
steps.description: Fold dry ingredients into wet alternately with milk until smooth batter forms.
steps.text: Fold dry ingredients into wet alternately with milk until smooth batter forms.

steps.title: Bake
steps.description: Fill cupcake liners ¾ full, bake at 180°C for 18–20 min until a toothpick comes out clean.
steps.text: Fill cupcake liners ¾ full, bake at 180°C for 18–20 min until a toothpick comes out clean.

steps.title: Cool and frost
steps.description: Cool completely before piping or spreading frosting.
steps.text: Cool completely before piping or spreading frosting.

title: Glazed Donuts
description: Soft fried donuts dipped in a simple sweet glaze.

steps.title: Mix dry
steps.description: Whisk flour, sugar, and baking powder together in a bowl.
steps.text: Whisk flour, sugar, and baking powder together in a bowl.

steps.title: Wet mix
steps.description: In another bowl, mix melted butter, eggs, milk, and vanilla.
steps.text: In another bowl, mix melted butter, eggs, milk, and vanilla.

steps.title: Combine
steps.description: Gently fold wet into dry until a soft dough forms. Do not overmix.
steps.text: Gently fold wet into dry until a soft dough forms. Do not overmix.

steps.title: Shape
steps.description: Roll dough and cut into donut shapes, fry in oil for 3 min each side until golden.
steps.text: Roll dough and cut into donut shapes, fry in oil for 3 min each side until golden.

steps.title: Glaze
steps.description: Dip warm donuts in the sugar-milk glaze, let excess drip off.
steps.text: Dip warm donuts in the sugar-milk glaze, let excess drip off.

steps.title: Cool and serve
steps.description: Place on a rack to set glaze, then serve.
steps.text: Place on a rack to set glaze, then serve.

title: Fluffy Waffles
description: Fluffy waffles with crisp edges, vanilla aroma, and breakfast-ready sweetness.

steps.title: Mix dry
steps.description: Whisk flour, sugar, and baking powder together.
steps.text: Whisk flour, sugar, and baking powder together.

steps.title: Wet mix
steps.description: Whisk eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla in a separate bowl.
steps.text: Whisk eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla in a separate bowl.

steps.title: Combine
steps.description: Gently fold wet into dry until just combined. Small lumps are fine.
steps.text: Gently fold wet into dry until just combined. Small lumps are fine.

steps.title: Cook
steps.description: Pour batter into preheated, greased waffle iron, cook 4–5 min until golden and crispy.
steps.text: Pour batter into preheated, greased waffle iron, cook 4–5 min until golden and crispy.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Hot with your choice of toppings — syrup, butter, berries.
steps.text: Hot with your choice of toppings — syrup, butter, berries.

title: Garlicky Bread
description: Toasty garlic bread with butter, parsley, salt, and crisp golden edges.

steps.title: Mix
steps.description: Combine softened butter, minced garlic, salt, and chopped parsley until fully blended.
steps.text: Combine softened butter, minced garlic, salt, and chopped parsley until fully blended.

steps.title: Spread
steps.description: Cut bread in half lengthwise or slice into portions, spread garlic butter generously on cut side.
steps.text: Cut bread in half lengthwise or slice into portions, spread garlic butter generously on cut side.

steps.title: Bake
steps.description: Place on a baking tray, bake at 180°C for 10 min until butter is melted and edges are crispy.
steps.text: Place on a baking tray, bake at 180°C for 10 min until butter is melted and edges are crispy.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Hot immediately.
steps.text: Hot immediately.

title: Crispy Nuggets
description: Crispy chicken nuggets made from seasoned minced chicken and fried until golden.

steps.title: Mix
steps.description: Combine minced chicken with beaten egg, spices, and baking powder. Mix until uniform.
steps.text: Combine minced chicken with beaten egg, spices, and baking powder. Mix until uniform.

steps.title: Shape
steps.description: Form mixture into small bite-sized nugget shapes.
steps.text: Form mixture into small bite-sized nugget shapes.

steps.title: Dredge
steps.description: Roll each nugget in flour to coat all sides.
steps.text: Roll each nugget in flour to coat all sides.

steps.title: Fry
steps.description: Heat oil to 180°C, fry nuggets 5–6 min until golden and cooked through.
steps.text: Heat oil to 180°C, fry nuggets 5–6 min until golden and cooked through.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Hot with dipping sauce.
steps.text: Hot with dipping sauce.

title: Salty Popcorn
description: Simple salty popcorn popped hot in oil and tossed with salt.

steps.title: Heat oil
steps.description: Pour oil into a large pot, heat over medium-high until a kernel placed in oil begins to sizzle.
steps.text: Pour oil into a large pot, heat over medium-high until a kernel placed in oil begins to sizzle.

steps.title: Pop
steps.description: Add all kernels, cover with a lid, and shake the pot gently every 30 seconds until popping slows to 2 seconds between pops.
steps.text: Add all kernels, cover with a lid, and shake the pot gently every 30 seconds until popping slows to 2 seconds between pops.

steps.title: Season
steps.description: Transfer to a bowl immediately, sprinkle salt generously, toss and serve.
steps.text: Transfer to a bowl immediately, sprinkle salt generously, toss and serve.

title: Tasty Sandwich
description: A grilled sandwich with cheese, tomato, onion, sauce, and buttery crisp bread.

steps.title: Spread
steps.description: Apply mustard or sauce on one side of each bread slice.
steps.text: Apply mustard or sauce on one side of each bread slice.

steps.title: Layer
steps.description: On one slice, layer cheese, sliced tomato, and onion.
steps.text: On one slice, layer cheese, sliced tomato, and onion.

steps.title: Close
steps.description: Press the second slice on top firmly.
steps.text: Press the second slice on top firmly.

steps.title: Grill
steps.description: Spread butter on outside of both bread faces, cook on a hot pan until both sides are golden and cheese melts.
steps.text: Spread butter on outside of both bread faces, cook on a hot pan until both sides are golden and cheese melts.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Hot, cut diagonally.
steps.text: Hot, cut diagonally.

title: Butter Chicken (Indian Cuisine)
description: Creamy Indian butter chicken with yogurt-marinated chicken and tomato-butter sauce.That is Heaven

steps.description: Combine chicken with yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, garam masala, chili powder, and salt. Marinate for at least 1 hour.
steps.text: Combine chicken with yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, garam masala, chili powder, and salt. Marinate for at least 1 hour.

steps.description: Heat oil in a pan, sauté marinated chicken until browned on all sides.
steps.text: Heat oil in a pan, sauté marinated chicken until browned on all sides.

steps.description: In the same pan, melt butter, add tomato puree and remaining spices, cook for 10 min until sauce thickens.
steps.text: In the same pan, melt butter, add tomato puree and remaining spices, cook for 10 min until sauce thickens.

steps.description: Add browned chicken to sauce, stir to coat, simmer for 15 min.
steps.text: Add browned chicken to sauce, stir to coat, simmer for 15 min.

steps.description: Stir in cream and a knob of butter for richness.
steps.text: Stir in cream and a knob of butter for richness.

steps.description: Remove from heat, rest 5 min.
steps.text: Remove from heat, rest 5 min.

steps.description: Hot with steamed rice or naan bread.
steps.text: Hot with steamed rice or naan bread.

title: Pad Thai (Thai Cuisine)
description: Thai-style pad thai with rice noodles, tamarind sauce, egg, bean sprouts, and peanuts.

steps.title: Soak noodles
steps.description: Soak rice noodles in cold water for 30 min until softened, drain.
steps.text: Soak rice noodles in cold water for 30 min until softened, drain.

steps.title: Sauce mix
steps.description: Stir together tamarind paste, fish sauce, and sugar until sugar dissolves.
steps.text: Stir together tamarind paste, fish sauce, and sugar until sugar dissolves.

steps.title: Cook protein
steps.description: Heat oil in a wok, sauté garlic, add chicken or tofu, cook until golden.
steps.text: Heat oil in a wok, sauté garlic, add chicken or tofu, cook until golden.

steps.title: Egg
steps.description: Push protein aside, crack eggs in, scramble lightly, then mix together.
steps.text: Push protein aside, crack eggs in, scramble lightly, then mix together.

steps.title: Noodles
steps.description: Add soaked noodles and pour sauce over, stir-fry together for 3 min.
steps.text: Add soaked noodles and pour sauce over, stir-fry together for 3 min.

steps.title: Veggies
steps.description: Toss in beansprouts, stir briefly.
steps.text: Toss in beansprouts, stir briefly.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Top with crushed peanuts and a lime wedge.
steps.text: Top with crushed peanuts and a lime wedge.

title: Sushi (Japanese Cuisine)
description: Classic sushi rolls with seasoned rice, nori, fish, cucumber, and soy sauce.

steps.title: Cook rice
steps.description: Steam sushi rice until cooked, then stir in rice vinegar, sugar, and salt while warm.
steps.text: Steam sushi rice until cooked, then stir in rice vinegar, sugar, and salt while warm.

steps.title: Cool
steps.description: Fan rice to room temperature before using.
steps.text: Fan rice to room temperature before using.

steps.title: Prep fillings
steps.description: Slice fish into thin strips, julienne cucumber.
steps.text: Slice fish into thin strips, julienne cucumber.

steps.title: Roll
steps.description: Lay nori on bamboo mat, spread rice evenly leaving a border. Place fish and cucumber in a line, roll tightly.
steps.text: Lay nori on bamboo mat, spread rice evenly leaving a border. Place fish and cucumber in a line, roll tightly.

steps.title: Cut
steps.description: Slice into even pieces using a wet knife.
steps.text: Slice into even pieces using a wet knife.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: With soy sauce and pickled ginger.
steps.text: With soy sauce and pickled ginger.

title: Red Velvet Cake (USA)
description: Moist red velvet cake with cocoa, buttermilk, red color, and cream cheese frosting.

steps.title: Cream butter and sugar
steps.description: Beat softened butter and sugar until pale and fluffy.
steps.text: Beat softened butter and sugar until pale and fluffy.

steps.title: Add eggs, vanilla, and color
steps.description: Mix in eggs one at a time, then vanilla and red food colour.
steps.text: Mix in eggs one at a time, then vanilla and red food colour.

steps.title: Dry mix
steps.description: Sift together flour, cocoa powder, and baking soda.
steps.text: Sift together flour, cocoa powder, and baking soda.

steps.title: Combine
steps.description: Alternately fold dry ingredients and buttermilk into the wet mixture until smooth.
steps.text: Alternately fold dry ingredients and buttermilk into the wet mixture until smooth.

steps.title: Bake
steps.description: Pour into greased cake pans, bake at 180°C for 30–35 min until a toothpick comes out clean.
steps.text: Pour into greased cake pans, bake at 180°C for 30–35 min until a toothpick comes out clean.

steps.title: Cool and frost
steps.description: Cool completely, frost with cream cheese frosting.
steps.text: Cool completely, frost with cream cheese frosting.

title: Cream Cheese Pizza
description: Cream cheese pizza with garlic, mozzarella, spinach, and a golden baked crust.

steps.title: Prep dough
steps.description: Stretch pizza dough onto a greased baking pan, drizzle with olive oil.
steps.text: Stretch pizza dough onto a greased baking pan, drizzle with olive oil.

steps.title: Spread base
steps.description: Mix cream cheese with minced garlic, spread evenly over dough.
steps.text: Mix cream cheese with minced garlic, spread evenly over dough.

steps.title: Top
steps.description: Scatter mozzarella cheese and chopped spinach over the cream cheese layer.
steps.text: Scatter mozzarella cheese and chopped spinach over the cream cheese layer.

steps.title: Season
steps.description: Sprinkle salt over the top.
steps.text: Sprinkle salt over the top.

steps.title: Bake
steps.description: Bake at 200°C (400°F) for 15–18 min until crust is golden and cheese is bubbly.
steps.text: Bake at 200°C (400°F) for 15–18 min until crust is golden and cheese is bubbly.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Slice and serve hot.
steps.text: Slice and serve hot.

title: Authentic Beef Mandhi
description: Authentic beef mandhi with spiced beef, basmati rice, ghee, tomato, and slow dum cooking.

steps.title: Marinate beef
steps.description: Rub beef chunks with mandhi spice mix, garlic, lemon juice, and salt. Marinate for 2 hours minimum.
steps.text: Rub beef chunks with mandhi spice mix, garlic, lemon juice, and salt. Marinate for 2 hours minimum.

steps.title: Cook beef
steps.description: Sauté fried onion and tomato in ghee, add marinated beef and cook on medium heat for 30 min until tender.
steps.text: Sauté fried onion and tomato in ghee, add marinated beef and cook on medium heat for 30 min until tender.

steps.title: Soak rice
steps.description: Wash basmati rice and soak in cold water for 30 min, drain.
steps.text: Wash basmati rice and soak in cold water for 30 min, drain.

steps.title: Layer
steps.description: In a large heavy pot, place cooked beef at the bottom, then add soaked rice, drizzle ghee, top with fried onions.
steps.text: In a large heavy pot, place cooked beef at the bottom, then add soaked rice, drizzle ghee, top with fried onions.

steps.title: Dum cook
steps.description: Pour water over, seal pot tightly with foil and lid, cook on very low heat for 45–60 min.
steps.text: Pour water over, seal pot tightly with foil and lid, cook on very low heat for 45–60 min.

steps.title: Rest
steps.description: Remove from heat, let rest sealed for 10 min.
steps.text: Remove from heat, let rest sealed for 10 min.

steps.title: Fluff
steps.description: Gently mix and fluff the rice without breaking the grains.
steps.text: Gently mix and fluff the rice without breaking the grains.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Hot on a large platter.
steps.text: Hot on a large platter.

title: Blueberry Smoothie
description: A cold blueberry smoothie blended with yogurt, milk, honey, and ice.

steps.title: Combine
steps.description: Add blueberries, yogurt, honey, milk, and ice to a blender.
steps.text: Add blueberries, yogurt, honey, milk, and ice to a blender.

steps.title: Blend
steps.description: Blend on high until completely smooth, about 30 seconds.
steps.text: Blend on high until completely smooth, about 30 seconds.

steps.title: Adjust
steps.description: Add more milk for thinner consistency or more honey for sweetness if needed.
steps.text: Add more milk for thinner consistency or more honey for sweetness if needed.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Pour into glasses and serve cold immediately.
steps.text: Pour into glasses and serve cold immediately.

title: Choco-Berry Cake
description: Chocolate berry cake with cocoa sponge, mixed berries, and tender crumb.

steps.title: Cream butter and sugar
steps.description: Beat softened butter and sugar until pale and fluffy.
steps.text: Beat softened butter and sugar until pale and fluffy.

steps.title: Add eggs and vanilla
steps.description: Beat in eggs one at a time, then vanilla extract.
steps.text: Beat in eggs one at a time, then vanilla extract.

steps.title: Dry mix
steps.description: Sift together flour, cocoa powder, and baking powder.
steps.text: Sift together flour, cocoa powder, and baking powder.

steps.title: Combine
steps.description: Fold dry mixture into wet alternately with milk until smooth batter forms.
steps.text: Fold dry mixture into wet alternately with milk until smooth batter forms.

steps.title: Add berries
steps.description: Gently fold in mixed berries without crushing them.
steps.text: Gently fold in mixed berries without crushing them.

steps.title: Bake
steps.description: Pour into greased cake pan, bake at 180°C for 35–40 min. Cool completely before serving.
steps.text: Pour into greased cake pan, bake at 180°C for 35–40 min. Cool completely before serving.
